name: workspace-shared-repos
question: Which sibling git repos does this project consume via workspace declarations?

schema.discoveryMethod: string (comma-separated sources used in priority order, or 'none')

_repoEntry_schema.path: string (absolute path to the shared repo)
_repoEntry_schema.declarationSource: string (one of: 'explicit', 'pnpm', 'cargo', 'npm') -- the source whose entry was retained after multi-source dedup; explicit always wins
_repoEntry_schema.hasGit: boolean (always true; entries without .git/ are filtered before output)
_repoEntry_schema.hasClaudeDir: boolean (true if <path>/.claude/ exists; informational hint that SHARED-CSI-05 auto-creation is unnecessary for this repo)

consultation.typical_sessions_using: every (cheap, gracefully absent on single-project setups); also consumed by /0-uldf-finalize setup phase and session-start hook

fallback: Read .claude/config.json (sharedRepos field), pnpm-workspace.yaml (packages: list), Cargo.toml ([workspace] members), and package.json (workspaces field). Resolve each declared path relative to the declaration file's location. Filter to those with their own .git/ directory. Skip the local working tree itself. Deduplicate by absolute path with priority order: explicit > pnpm > cargo > npm.

explicit.shape: array of {path: string, role?: string} OR array of strings
explicit.rationale: Always wins. Escape hatch for non-standard layouts. Submodule consumers point this at the submodule checkout path.

pnpm.shape: list of strings (literal paths or glob patterns)

cargo.shape: list of strings (literal paths; glob patterns supported)

npm.shape: array of strings OR object with packages:[] field

_outOfScope_v1.submodules: .gitmodules — different lifecycle (detached HEAD, ref pinning); use explicit list pointing at the submodule checkout path
_outOfScope_v1.lerna_nx_bazel: Custom workspace runners — parser surface area without proportional value; explicit list covers them
_outOfScope_v1.nestedPackages: Workspace packages within the local working tree are filtered out (not separate repos); local-finalize handles their files

filterContract.requireGit: Each candidate path must have its own <path>/.git/ directory; entries without .git/ are silently dropped
filterContract.skipSelf: If a declaration resolves to the local working tree itself (degenerate self-reference), it is dropped
filterContract.skipNested: If a declaration resolves to a path strictly inside the local working tree, it is dropped (nested workspace package, not a sibling repo)
filterContract.absolutePaths: All output paths are absolute; relative declarations are resolved against the declaration file's parent directory
filterContract.dedup: When the same absolute path appears in multiple declaration sources, the highest-priority source wins (explicit > pnpm > cargo > npm); the entry's declarationSource reflects the winner

snapshotContract.summary: SHARED-CSI-02 captures per-shared-repo dirty-state snapshots at session-start. SHARED-FINALIZE-02 consumes these snapshots at /0-uldf-finalize time to partition dirty files into 'session-authored' (Set 1) vs 'pre-existing' (Set 2). The snapshot schema is frozen here; CLAUDE-B writes per this contract; CLAUDE-C reads.

schema.schemaVersion: integer (always 1 in this arc; bump for future breaking changes via decision-channel + LD approval)
schema.repoPath: string (absolute path of the shared repo)

_dirtyFilesEntry_schema.path: string (relative path from the SHARED REPO's root, NOT the local project root)
_dirtyFilesEntry_schema.status: string (git's two-letter status notation; the FIRST character (working-tree status) is what matters for snapshot purposes; values: M, A, D, ??)
_dirtyFilesEntry_schema.contentHash: string (SHA-256 hex of the file content at snapshot time; CLAUDE-C compares this against the same file's hash at /0-uldf-finalize time to detect 'modified during this session' classification)

invariants.emptyDirtyFiles: Empty dirtyFiles[] is valid and means the shared repo was clean at session start; CLAUDE-C interprets this as 'no pre-existing baseline -- every dirty file at finalize is session-authored'
invariants.pathRelativity: dirtyFiles[].path is ALWAYS relative to the shared repo's root, NOT relative to the local project. CLAUDE-B captures via 'git -C <sharedRepo> status --porcelain' which already emits repo-relative paths.
invariants.hashAlgorithm: SHA-256 is mandatory. No alternative hash algorithms in v1; future bumps require schemaVersion increment.
invariants.snapshotLifetime: Session-scoped: written by SHARED-CSI-02 at session-start; consumed by SHARED-FINALIZE-02 at /0-uldf-finalize time; not preserved across sessions (next session-start overwrites).

provenance.note: Stage 1 foundation deliverable for the cross-project visibility arc (CSI Phase 1.5). Output schema and snapshot schema are FROZEN at first commit -- no consumer-breaking changes without explicit decision-channel entry + LD approval. Submodules + Lerna/Nx/Bazel out of scope for v1 (DEC-35); explicit-list escape hatch covers them. Pattern-mirrors CSI-05's dispatchable-sessions skeleton (per DISC-CSI-09 transferable-skeleton finding) without inheriting its --gc / --gc-cheap surface -- discovery oracles do not sweep state.
